历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 4467, dropping to about 5837 in 2024 (a backward shift of 1370), and recovering to about 5569 in 2025 (a forward shift of 268). The overall trend over the past three years has been a backward shift, with a baseline of about 5569 in 2025. The provincial science enrollment plan was 14 in 2023, 15 in 2024, 16 in 2025, and 16 in 2026. The 2026 plan remains unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, and competitive pressure has not eased due to plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 113th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings fluctuating between 99 and 113, overall stable. The university's reputation has been steady in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Douyin popularity ranking is 50th (relatively hot), with moderate attention on short video platforms and no abnormal warming signals.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Automation are highly popular and recommended, aligning with the university's strengths. Business Administration majors are notably discouraged. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 238,000 (a significant increase from about 52,500 science candidates in 2025), sharply intensifying the competitive environment. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning, a coastal city in Northeast China, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Xinjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of backward shifts, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the number of provincial candidates leading to intensified competition, and the stable university level and reputation, competition is expected to further intensify and rankings to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 5569. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5669, with a range of 5169-6169.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5169-6169, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 5169), prioritize competitive engineering majors like Electronic Information and Automation; if the ranking is near the upper limit (around 6169), mainly rely on Business Administration and Public Management as safety options.
